name: Coral Ceramic Decorative Object - Threshold™ designed with Studio McGee
description:
Add a touch of coastal charm to your decor with this Coral Ceramic Decorative Object from Threshold™ designed with Studio McGee. This decorative piece showcases a coral-inspired design finished in earthy cream and brown tones with wavy, scalloped accents. Made from ceramic, it brings organic appeal to your mantel, coffee table, shelf or console.

Threshold™ designed with Studio McGee: Looks like home, feels like you.
